title: Hat Yai、Songkhla — 生活成本、住房与搬迁指南 [2026]
description: Hat Yai、Songkhla的完整指南：生活成本、房价、社区、远程工作准备情况和搬迁建议。
content:
概述

Hat Yai是Songkhla的一个城市，人口约400,000。The commercial hub of southern Thailand, popular with Malaysian visitors and expats, offering a multicultural atmosphere and very affordable living.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
